openQuestionsResolved.resolution: Type constructor param as VehicleSummaryDto? via super; fallback to field-shadow if codegen fails. No @JsonKey converter needed.

Leave _buildCreateBody as-is this iteration (non-1:1 payload). Capture as follow-up tech-debt for a dedicated request DTO. Line 182 (fromModel().toJson()) MUST become maintenance.toJson() via new extension.
DTO expiryDate becomes non-nullable (required super.expiryDate), matching the model. Null from API will throw; backend contract guarantees non-null when a SOAT exists.
